postings.evidence: Title mentions 'AI Quality Assurance Engineer' but snippet describes generic 'Software Engineer' duties: 'design, develop, create, modify, and validate embedded and cloud edge software.' No AI-specific responsibilities evident.

postings.evidence: Qualcomm Bangalore. 'AI/ML Performance Engineer' role: 'Analyze and optimize AI and Machine Learning workloads on Neural Processing Units (NPU).' ML optimization is core duty.

postings.title: Senior Data Centre Network Engineer at Qualcomm - Ireland | Visa Sponsorship Jobs
